---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for flusso
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? A clear description of
the problem or limitation motivating this request.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen. If it touches config or schema syntax, sketch what
that would look like.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else — use cases, related issues, prior art in similar tools.
